channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Federal Medicaid Funding for Planned Parenthood Resumes After Yearlong Defunding Battle
item.description:
After nearly a year of federal funding restrictions under a Republican legislative provision, Medicaid reimbursements to Planned Parenthood and two regional abortion providers have resumed, restoring coverage for non abortion services and reigniting political debate over reproductive healthcare access
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/health/medicaid-planned-parenthood-funding-resumes-2026
